This film is about how to coach a couple to develop presence, playfulness and trust. Many couples once enjoyed great love and passion, but have noticed a decline in their playfulness, passion and trust, and they blame it on their age or the age of the relationship. The truth is that passion does not depend on age. It depends on the experience of total emotional presence between two people.
